intro: Reads your staged diff, learns your repo's commit style, and produces Conventional Commits-compliant messages — one polished commit, or a cleanly split series. Provider-agnostic: OpenCode-routed models, the Claude CLI, or the Anthropic API.

features.title: AI-generated conventional commits from your staged diff
Smart commit splitting into atomic, selectively-staged commits
Gitmoji styles — standard, gitmoji, and gitmoji-pure
Privacy-aware diff filtering — three tiers control what's sent to the model
